title: Sending an Email
content: This afternoon, I needed to send an email to my teacher. I opened my email application and carefully wrote the message. Before sending it, I checked the spelling and made sure I included all the necessary information. I also attached a document with my completed assignment. A few minutes later, I received a confirmation that the email had been delivered. Email is a simple and useful way to communicate. It allows people to exchange information quickly, even when they are far apart. I use it almost every day.
